Permit Intelligence Console

Mission control for permit risk, momentum, and operator decisions.

Run a tactical permit review on a property, inspect likely blockers, and move directly into next actions with a mobile-first command surface.

Hero Command Bar

Input an address, city, APN, and optional permit number to stage a tactical permit intelligence run.

Mock Ops

Runs against the Mission Control report endpoint, with demo-safe fallback behavior when live data is unavailable.

    Why This Read Holds Up
    
                  
    Small proof layer, not a hype layer
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  Signal Mix
                  
    Mission Control blends permit activity, timeline structure, and operator action framing into one scan.
    
                
    
                
    
                  Operator Use
                  
    Built to help owners, expediters, and GCs decide whether a file is actually moving or just generating surface activity.
    
                
    
                
    
                  Beta Promise
                  
    Fast tactical read first. Deeper review only when the case actually warrants escalation.
